name: Klarify
long_description:
Klarify handles everything therapists do outside the session, from clinical notes and treatment plans to insurance claims and finding new clients.

Therapists hold the world together. They also run businesses, file insurance claims, write letters, fill forms, supervise new grads, and do hours of paperwork every night. Most software helps with one of those jobs. None help with all.

Klara is the AI at the heart of Klarify. She starts with writing notes, and uses that context across the rest of practice life: handling insurance, treatment plans, clinical letters, research, client homework, supervision prep, between-session progress, and more.

5,200 therapists use Klarify today. Privacy-first. Klara never trains on your notes or client data.

Our mission is to empower therapists, not replace them. So they can focus on the one thing only a human can do. Be fully there.
one_liner: AI-native operating system for mental health practices
